items.text: This inspection is a procedure to check for any abnormality in the fully closed position of the accelerator pedal position sensor.
This inspection is a procedure to check for any abnormality in the fully closed position of the accelerator pedal position sensor.
For anomalies other than the fully closed position, DTCs are detected and are not included in this inspection procedure.
For anomalies other than the fully closed position, DTCs are detected and are not included in this inspection procedure.
Check DTCs before performing the inspection, and if DTCs are displayed, diagnose the malfunction of the displayed DTCs.
Check DTCs before performing the inspection, and if DTCs are displayed, diagnose the malfunction of the displayed DTCs.

blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat.
2. Gas pedal Pedal Position Sensor Check
With the foot off the accelerator pedal, check the AP sensor in the data list with HDS.

items.text: If the display shows 0%, the accelerator pedal position sensor is normal.
If the display shows 0%, the accelerator pedal position sensor is normal.
If the display is not 0%, Replace the accelerator pedal assembly.
If the display is not 0%, Replace the accelerator pedal assembly.
